texto: The romanticism of struggle is over. What remains are the utterly naked facts. The cult of personality and its collapse. Rethinking of everything. The masks are off (the mask of religion, the mask of heroism…).
explicacao: Citação de Sonallah Ibrahim sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The romanticism of struggle is over. What remains are the utterly naked facts. The cult of person…” articula reflexao, revolution, romanticism em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
